use_cases: Displaying structured tabular data in web applications
Presenting pricing information in a clear, organized format
Showing dataset rows with optional striping for readability
Creating sortable data tables with header and body sections
Building data grids with optional hover interactivity
ai_summary: A composite table component from the Shugar design system featuring modular subcomponents for headers, body, rows, cells, and footers. Supports striped rows for alternating row colors and basic hover interactivity. Designed with minimalist styling including rounded corners, subtle borders, and a clean typography system using the sans font family. Fully responsive with horizontal scroll support for mobile platforms.
